prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large blue metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_2: small purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: large green metal sphere
  - obj_4: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_5: small gray rubber cube
  - obj_6: small green metal sphere
  - obj_7: small red metal cylinder
  - obj_8: large yellow metal cube

Questions:
[qrr_0301] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0302] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0303] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0304] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0305] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0306] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0307] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0308] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0309] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0310] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0311] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0312] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0313] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0314] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0315] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0316] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0317] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0318] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0319] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0320] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
